description_long: This is a rectangular wooden picnic table with two long benches attached on either side, designed for communal outdoor dining. The tabletop is made of several parallel wooden planks with visible gaps between them, and it is set with four round, light-colored plates and a single cylindrical cup or tumbler in the center. The benches are constructed from matching wooden planks and are supported by sturdy wooden legs and crossbeams, providing stability and durability. The wood has a medium brown finish, giving the table a natural and rustic appearance suitable for parks or recreational areas. The table's structure is robust, with thick planks and solid joinery, ensuring it can withstand frequent use and exposure to the elements. There is no visible hole in the center of the tabletop for an umbrella.
description: A sturdy, brown wooden picnic table with attached benches, set with four plates and a central cup. The design is rustic and robust, ideal for outdoor communal seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the length of the table, attached benches, and the arrangement of plates and cup along the tabletop.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the benches, the tabletop, and the symmetrical placement of the plates and cup.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the bench and tabletop with visible dishware.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the benches and tabletop from the other side.
attribute_tabletop_support_structure: The tabletop is supported by thick wooden legs at each end, reinforced by horizontal crossbeams and diagonal braces connecting the legs to the benches for added stability.
